title: rubus rusbyi
intro: Rubus rusbyi, also known as Rusby's Raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to the western United States and Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus rusbyi include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. Rubus rusbyi is traditionally prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used in herbal infusions and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
